headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .160 / .344 / .160.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Tampa Bay Rays, KC 12, TB 5. Nick Loftin led the night, 4-5 | HR, 2 RBI, 4 R in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 110.0 mph.

player_of_game.name: Nick Loftin
player_of_game.reason: 4-5 | HR, 2 RBI, 4 R in the latest Royals game.
